overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a lush forest environment with vibrant red undergrowth, crossing a primitive wooden rope bridge, and wading through a shallow river. The scene features cinematic lighting with sun rays filtering through the canopy and distant mountain vistas.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward a wooden bridge, surrounded by lush vegetation

entered.detail: sandy brown trail winding through the forest
dense red and pink vegetation lining the left side of the path
dense red and pink vegetation lining the right side of the path
primitive rope and log bridge spanning the stream ahead
tall deciduous trees with dense green canopy
tall deciduous trees with dense green canopy

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit forest trail surrounded by vibrant red undergrowth and tall trees. The path leads toward a wooden rope bridge visible in the distance, with morning light casting long shadows across the dirt surface.

events.description: character steps onto wooden bridge crossing the river
character exits bridge onto opposite bank

agents.ego_description: carefully crossing the wooden rope bridge, looking down at the water below

entered.detail: thick braided rope handrails on the left side of the bridge
thick braided rope handrails on the right side of the bridge
clear flowing stream visible beneath the bridge planks

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a narrow wooden rope bridge suspended over a flowing stream. The bridge sways slightly as the character walks across the log planks, with rope railings on either side and the river visible below through gaps in the wood.

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path parallel to the river, heading toward distant mountains

entered.detail: sandy trail continuing along the riverbank
misty mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the character walks along a riverside trail with the stream flowing on the right. The path winds through scattered trees with distant mountains visible ahead, bathed in soft morning light.

events.description: character steps off riverbank into shallow water
distant wooden bridge becomes visible downstream

agents.ego_description: wading through the knee-deep river, creating ripples and splashes with each step

entered.detail: smooth stones visible beneath the clear water surface
another wooden bridge visible downstream spanning the river
sandy shore with red vegetation on the left bank
rocky shore with green undergrowth on the right bank

segments.scene_description: The character steps into the shallow river and continues wading through the clear water. Submerged rocks are visible beneath the surface, and a distant wooden bridge comes into view downstream as the character moves through the current.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush forest that transitions from a sunlit trail to a river crossing. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path surrounded by vibrant red undergrowth and tall trees, moving toward a wooden rope bridge in the distance. As the character reaches the structure, the camera follows them across the swaying log planks suspended over a flowing stream. The scene then shifts to a riverside trail where the path winds through scattered trees and opens up to reveal distant mountains bathed in soft morning light. Finally, the character steps off the trail and wades into the clear, shallow water, moving past submerged rocks toward another wooden bridge visible downstream.
